# RCSService.Business.OpenURLAction.Target.defaultBrowser

**Case**

Open using default browser.

## Declaration

```swift
case defaultBrowser
```

## Accessing targets

- **RCSService.Business.OpenURLAction.Target.inApp(detent:)**: Open in-app.
- **RCSService.Business.OpenURLAction.Detent**: Enumeration that represents a height to apply when opening a URL.
